title: Accountant
description: Accountants manage financial records, prepare reports, handle tax documents and help businesses track income and expenses.

title: AI Engineer
description: AI engineers build intelligent systems, automation tools and machine learning models.

title: Architect
description: Architects design buildings, layouts and spaces while considering safety, beauty, structure and functionality.

title: Banker
description: Bankers help customers with accounts, loans, deposits, financial services and banking operations.

title: Business Analyst
description: Business analysts study business problems, gather requirements and suggest better processes or technology solutions.

title: Civil Engineer
description: Civil engineers design and supervise construction projects such as roads, bridges, buildings and water systems.

title: Content Writer
description: Content writers create articles, blogs, website content, social media posts and marketing copy.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Cybersecurity analysts protect systems, networks and data from cyber attacks and security threats.

title: Data Analyst
qualification: Any Degree + Excel, SQL, Power BI
description: Data analysts collect, clean and analyze data to help companies make better decisions.

title: Data Scientist
description: Data scientists use statistics, machine learning and programming to solve complex data problems.

title: Doctor
description: Doctors diagnose illnesses, treat patients and guide people toward better health.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: DevOps engineers automate deployment, manage cloud systems and improve software delivery pipelines.
